source: Smelling Salts Review — extracted from conversation history lines 77-78, 81
name: Cooperative Phone Negotiation — The Union Boss Mechanic
description: 1,000 Ruby Reds = collective bargaining power with phone companies. Grace has built-in motivation to help Ruby recruit others because more members = better rates = more members. This is the flywheel that makes Maven self-sustaining. The Union Boss is the fourth pillar of the Three-Legged Stool (added in Grace Persistence Architecture v5.0).
north_star_alignment: Phone bills are one of Ruby Red's top 3 monthly expenses. She is paying $80-120/month for a plan that should cost $40. The greedy capitalist world charges her more because she has no leverage. Maven gives her leverage through collective bargaining.

original_three_legs: Leg 1: Corner Banker / Guardian — AI-powered relationship banker
Leg 2: Big Mama / Local Community — Reconnects Ruby to neighbors
Leg 3: Phone / Digital Citizenship — Staying connected to 21st century
three_legged_stool_integration.fourth_pillar_addition: Union Boss — data sovereignty, collective bargaining. Added in Grace Persistence Architecture v5.0 as the fourth pillar that makes the stool a table.
three_legged_stool_integration.vault_source: Grace Persistence Architecture v6.2 (26,500 words, built but not committed as standalone)

mechanic_flow.trigger: Grace identifies Ruby is paying too much for her phone plan during financial conversation
mechanic_flow.grace_behavior: Grace says: 'I noticed you're paying $95 a month for your phone. That's too much. I know because I've helped 847 other women with the same plan. Want me to fix this?'
mechanic_flow.design_principle: Grace uses collective data to demonstrate she has leverage Ruby doesn't have alone

mechanic_flow.trigger: Ruby agrees to let Grace negotiate
mechanic_flow.grace_behavior: Grace contacts the phone company on Ruby's behalf (or prepares Ruby with exact scripts and leverage points). Grace knows the retention department playbook.
mechanic_flow.design_principle: Grace does the cognitive work Ruby doesn't have bandwidth for

mechanic_flow.grace_behavior: Grace celebrates: 'We just saved you $35 a month. That's $420 a year. And here's the thing — the more women who join Maven, the better rates I can negotiate for everyone. Your neighbor could save too.'
mechanic_flow.design_principle: The savings are real and immediate. The recruitment pitch is organic — not forced.

mechanic_flow.trigger: Ruby tells her neighbor about the savings
mechanic_flow.grace_behavior: Grace facilitates the referral through the Family Tree mechanic. New member joins. Collective bargaining power increases.
mechanic_flow.design_principle: The flywheel: more members → better rates → more members

tier_4.leverage: Maven becomes an MVNO (Mobile Virtual Network Operator)

financial_impact.ruby_red_impact: Phone bill drops from $95 to $55 — that's 2 weeks of groceries

connection_to_other_features.union_boss_avatar: The Union Boss is one of Grace's 7 avatar personalities in the Swarm Mind architecture
connection_to_other_features.maven_data_cooperative: Phone usage data feeds the Maven Data Cooperative — anonymized, aggregated, deployed for village benefit
connection_to_other_features.dignity_score: Phone bill reduction improves Ruby's Dignity Score
connection_to_other_features.vampire_slayer: Works alongside Vampire Slayer to reduce total monthly outflow

build_complexity: HIGH — requires carrier API integrations, negotiation scripts, legal framework for collective bargaining
